heading_content_part: Privacy PolicySearch this siteSkip to main contentSkip to navigationPrivacy PolicyThanks for using Learn Language! We’re always looking for new ways to improve how you learn and work together using my appsHere’s a quick summary.1.

GeneralAt Innovation Apps, we care about your personal data, so we have prepared this Privacy Policy to explain how we collect, use and share it.By using or accessing the Service, you agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.2.

SecurityWe did not  collect information from the devices you use to learn the apps. However we only use recorder builtin your device to create audio with purpose improve speaking skill and to improve the product . Some lessons involve you speaking into the app. To recognize speech your audio may be sent to a third party provider such as Google, Apple, or Amazon Web Services.We did not use  information into any purpose or we won't sell it to advertisers or other third parties
We show ads from advertising partners who may set cookie that  allow tracking your device.

We reserves the right to display targeted advertisements based on personal information. Advertisers may assume that people who interact with, view, or click targeted ads meet the relevant targeting criteria. We does not provide any personal information to the advertiser when you interact with or view a targeted ad. However, by interacting with or viewing an ad you are consenting to the possibility that the advertiser will make the assumption that you meet the targeting criteria used to display the ad. This privacy policy dont cover the use of cookies by any advertisers.
ChangesWe may revise this Privacy Policy from time to time, and will update the most current version on our store. If a revision meaningfully reduces your rights, we will notify you.4.
